title: Mister Gutsy Blaze
description: The resource pack will add the Mister Gutsy model from the Fallout game, which replaces the blaze model.
body:
# Mister Gutsy Blaze

The resource pack will add the Mister Gutsy model from the Fallout game, which replaces the blaze model.

Need Optifine.

## Features

- Animated eyes and hands.
